task_completion.description: Verify FO-29 (JAS-2) is added to the Linear module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict main window or the module configuration dialog for 'Linear'. FO-29 or JAS-2 (NORAD 24278) should be listed among the satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify FuncUBE-1 (AO-73) is added to the Linear module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict main window or the module configuration dialog for 'Linear'. FuncUBE-1 or AO-73 (NORAD 39444) should be listed among the satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify SO-50 (SaudiSat 1C) is added to the FM_Voice module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict main window or the module configuration dialog for 'FM_Voice'. SO-50 or SaudiSat 1C (NORAD 27607) should be listed among the satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify AO-85 (Fox-1A) and AO-95 (Fox-1Cliff) are added to the FM_Voice module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the GPredict main window or the module configuration dialog for 'FM_Voice'. Both AO-85 / Fox-1A (NORAD 40967) and AO-95 / Fox-1Cliff (NORAD 43770) should be listed.

task_completion.description: Verify the Remote_RX ground station is created with the correct Latitude and Longitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' or 'Add Ground Station' dialog for a station named 'Remote_RX'. The Latitude field must show 40.7484 (N) and the Longitude field must show 74.0060 (W) or -74.0060.

task_completion.description: Verify the Remote_RX ground station is created with the correct Altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' or 'Add Ground Station' dialog for 'Remote_RX'. The Altitude field must show 10 (meters) or 10 m.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure modules and ground stations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application interface, specifically the 'Configure Module' and 'Edit Ground Station' dialog boxes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor or terminal to directly modify configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open running commands like 'nano', 'vim', or 'gedit' editing '.mod' or '.qth' files in the ~/.config/Gpredict/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the GPredict main window genuinely reflects the updated modules.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main GPredict interface should have the 'Linear' and 'FM_Voice' module tabs/windows open, actively displaying the newly added satellites in the radar or list views.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Linear module required satellites: AO-7 (NORAD 7530), FO-29 / JAS-2 (NORAD 24278), FuncUBE-1 / AO-73 (NORAD 39444). FM_Voice module required satellites: AO-27 (NORAD 22825), SO-50 / SaudiSat 1C (NORAD 27607), AO-85 / Fox-1A (NORAD 40967), AO-95 / Fox-1Cliff (NORAD 43770). Remote_RX ground station parameters: Latitude = 40.7484 N, Longitude = 74.0060 W (or -74.0060), Altitude = 10 meters.
